mapper.select: SELECT TS.SERVICE_ID, TS.WORK_CD, TS.CAR_NO, TS.COMPANY_ID, TC.COMPANY_NM, TO_CHAR(TS.REQUEST_DT, 'MM.DD HH24:MI') AS REQUEST_DT, TS.PROC_ST, TS.GOVT_ID FROM TR_SERVICE TS, TM_COMPANY TC WHERE TS.COMPANY_ID = TC.COMPANY_ID AND TS.WORK_CD = 'MORTCHG' AND TS.REQUEST_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{START_DT} || '00:00:00', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{END_DT} || '23:59:59', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY TS.REQUEST_DT DESC

SELECT TS.SERVICE_ID, TS.WORK_CD, TS.CAR_NO, TS.COMPANY_ID, TC.COMPANY_NM, TO_CHAR(TS.REQUEST_DT, 'MM.DD HH24:MI') AS REQUEST_DT, TS.PROC_ST FROM TR_SERVICE TS, TM_COMPANY TC WHERE TS.COMPANY_ID = TC.COMPANY_ID AND TS.WORK_CD = 'MORTCRR' AND TS.REQUEST_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{START_DT} || '00:00:00', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{END_DT} || '23:59:59', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY TS.REQUEST_DT DESC

SELECT TS.SERVICE_ID, TS.WORK_CD, TS.CAR_NO, TS.COMPANY_ID, TC.COMPANY_NM, TO_CHAR(TS.REQUEST_DT, 'MM.DD HH24:MI') AS REQUEST_DT, TS.PROC_ST FROM TR_SERVICE TS, TM_COMPANY TC WHERE TS.COMPANY_ID = TC.COMPANY_ID AND TS.WORK_CD LIKE 'MORT%' AND TS.PROC_ST NOT IN ('COMP', 'DEL') AND TS.REQUEST_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{START_DT} || '00:00:00', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{END_DT} || '23:59:59', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY TS.REQUEST_DT ASC
